overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA IV showing Niko Bellic running through rainy nighttime streets of Liberty City. The character navigates wet sidewalks and crosswalks past police cars, taxis, and urban infrastructure with reflective pavement and neon-lit billboards visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with food vendor kiosk and iron fence

events.description: LCPD police car drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: running along wet sidewalk past a green food vendor kiosk with an ATM

notable_agents.action: police car driving along the street parallel to the character

entered.detail: green kiosk with ATM and food service window on the corner
red brick building with multiple windows and stone foundation
black wrought iron fence running along the sidewalk edge
tall streetlight illuminating the wet pavement below

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a wet city sidewalk at night, passing a green food vendor kiosk on the left. An LCPD police car drives by on the right side of the street. The area is lined with a black iron fence and red brick buildings, with streetlights reflecting off the rain-soaked pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with police vehicles and digital billboard

events.description: character passes a parked LCPD police SUV on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along sidewalk approaching an intersection with increasing traffic

notable_agents.action: parked LCPD police SUV with emergency lights on the roof
yellow taxi cab driving down the street

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with 'LCPD' text visible in the distance
white police SUV with blue LCPD markings parked at the curb
stone steps leading up to a building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character continues running along the sidewalk, passing stone stairs on the left and approaching a parked LCPD police SUV on the right. A large digital billboard becomes visible in the distance, and yellow taxis drive along the wet street. The food vendor kiosk and iron fence from the previous area fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with construction walls and skyscrapers

events.description: character crosses the street at crosswalk entering a wider intersection area with skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet street at a crosswalk and continuing along the opposite sidewalk past parked vehicles

entered.detail: white construction barrier wall with wooden framing
tall modern glass and steel skyscraper with illuminated windows
dark colored SUV parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at a crosswalk, transitioning from the enclosed sidewalk to a wider intersection area. Tall skyscrapers dominate the background, and a white construction wall appears on the left. The character runs past parked SUVs and continues along the opposite sidewalk as the previous buildings fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street with high-rise buildings and traffic signals

events.description: character crosses another intersection at crosswalk as traffic light shows green

agents.ego_description: running along the sidewalk and crossing another street intersection with traffic lights

notable_agents.action: LCPD police car waiting at the intersection traffic light

entered.detail: traffic signal showing green light above the intersection
cluster of tall downtown buildings with illuminated windows
chain link fence surrounding a construction area

segments.scene_description: The character continues running through the downtown area, passing construction fencing on the left and approaching another intersection. An LCPD police car waits at the traffic light on the right. The character crosses the street at the crosswalk as the traffic signal shows green, with tall high-rise buildings surrounding the area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban corridor that shifts from a narrow sidewalk lined with brick buildings to a wide, skyscraper-dominated downtown intersection. It begins with the character running past a green food vendor kiosk and a black iron fence, while an LCPD police car drives by on the rain-soaked pavement. As the character continues forward, the scene opens up to reveal yellow taxis and a distant digital billboard, passing stone stairs and a parked police SUV. The camera then follows the character as they cross a street at a crosswalk, transitioning from the enclosed sidewalk to a wider area flanked by a white construction wall and towering high-rises. Finally, the movement leads through a downtown district past construction fencing and another waiting police car, ending as the character crosses a second intersection under the glow of city lights.
